title: Pumpkins Reimagined
body:
![Render](https://i.gyazo.com/788df53dc398634dd03f67c6f56e6e78.png)

This pack is originally from my pack [Minecraft Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) but I thought some people may like it but not my pack, so I decided to give it, it's standalone pack!

![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png)

Pumpkins Reimagined gives Pumpkins an entire new colorful remake which includes 24 new variants in total for both the Jack o Lantern and Carved Pumpkin!

This little pack should hopefully give your pumpkins some more life to them while giving you more fun faces to play with when decorating, perfect for this Halloween season!

The pack also makes sure to give different mobs different pumpkins, so a Zombie will have a different face versus a skeleton, same with a player or even the snowgolem!

![Preview](https://i.gyazo.com/511d19a6b900ce915cdddd6b59d1052d.jpg) ![Preview](https://i.gyazo.com/4783016be5810e303d1386353a8f8796.png)
